entries.content: 瑞草集（Sage Dispatch）已立项，项目目录E:\瑞草集\已就绪。Phase 0（调研推敲）等待HUTING通知后启动。当前不推进，等HUTING说开始再开始。 --drawer 项目/东方命运/方向

entries.content: 2026-06-16 ran market-research.ps1 for 瑞草集 market validation. Script was blocked by Reddit 403 and Quora security verification, so report used accessible competitor/search fallback evidence. Saved report to E:\瑞草集\调研\market-research-report.md. Conclusion: proceed with small pilot; pain point seems real with moderate confidence, strongest angle is beginner-friendly Chinese metaphysics/BaZi for tarot-native audiences. --drawer 项目调研

entries.content: 2026-06-16 为瑞草集（Sage Dispatch）完成 Phase 1 产品设计方案，保存到 E:\瑞草集\设计\product-design.md。方案包括内容规格书（每月10份、约1700英文词、英文正文+中文术语注释）、用户旅程、9.99/月定价模型、首月4.99优惠、邮件+会员专区分发、复用 Eastern Destiny AI 引擎的5-8天MVP技术方案。 --drawer 项目-瑞草集
